generated_oml:
instance BuildingControlSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system sensor specifications from enriched BIM files"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingControlSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingControlSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingControlSensor
]

instance BIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Enriched Building Information Modeling (BIM) files containing sensor, actuator, and controller specifications"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingControlSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance ModelTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation engine for generating deployable DT artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric model of building structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance SemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unified foundation for Building Control Systems components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control logic model for system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational status"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalStatusInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance needs and performance forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceForecastInsight, PerformanceForecastInsight
]

instance OperationalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational efficiency for energy and resource usage"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyOptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support for stakeholders across building lifecycle phases"
    DTDFVocab:provides LifecycleDecisionSupportInsight
]

instance OperationalStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational status of building systems"
]

instance MaintenanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted maintenance requirements based on system performance"
]

instance PerformanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected system performance metrics for future timeframes"
]

instance EfficiencyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized operational parameters for energy efficiency"
]

instance LifecycleDecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights for design, construction, and operations decisions"
]

instance BuildingAssetEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building asset lifecycle from design through construction to operations and maintenance"
    base:contains GeometricModel, SemanticModel, BehavioralModel, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]
